title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 259.160 - Rehearing
text:
259.160.  Rehearing. — Any person adversely affected by any order of the council may within thirty days after its effective date apply to the council in writing for a rehearing.  The application for rehearing shall be acted upon within fifteen days after its filing, and if granted, the rehearing shall be held without undue delay.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 917 § 16)
